info.title: AI-WMS API
info.description: Warehouse Management System REST API. All protected endpoints require a Bearer JWT token (except auth endpoints). Admin-only endpoints additionally require the "admin" role.

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from POST /auth/login

type.description: URI reference identifying the problem type

instance.description: URI reference of the request that caused the error

post.summary: Login and obtain JWT token pair
Create a zone within a warehouse
Create a location within a zone

get.summary: List all locations globally or lookup by barcode

delta_qty.description: Positive to add, negative to remove

get.summary: Get transaction history for an inventory record

status.description: New status (draft, confirmed, in_progress, completed, cancelled)

post.summary: Add a line to an order

qty.description: Actual qty processed (defaults to task qty)

200.description: Task completed with inventory effects applied

post.summary: Release a wave (creates tasks from orders)

400.description: Cannot release (wave not in correct state)

zone_id.description: Optional: limit to a specific zone

post.summary: Submit a line count for a cycle count
Finalize a cycle count (submits for review)

put.summary: Approve a cycle count (applies inventory adjustments)

200.description: Cycle count approved and adjustments applied
Stock inquiry result with inventory details
